sources.title: NIST SP 800-53 Rev. 5
sources.scope_notes: Broad control catalog for physical security, media protection, identification and authentication, audit and accountability, system integrity, and evidence-oriented compliance mappings.

sources.title: Kubernetes Authentication
sources.scope_notes: Authoritative source for Kubernetes human authentication models, lack of native normal-user objects, x509 vs token-based auth, OIDC integration, and structured authenticator configuration concepts.

sources.title: Kubernetes Auditing
sources.scope_notes: Covers audit event lifecycle, policy design, stages, backends, and the fields needed to answer who/what/when/from-where questions for compliance evidence.

sources.title: Kubernetes Encrypting Confidential Data at Rest
sources.scope_notes: Supports claims about etcd/API data at-rest encryption, KMS providers, why external key management is preferable to local raw keys, and operational caveats of encryption configuration.

sources.title: PKCS #11 Specification Version 3.1
sources.scope_notes: Normative API specification for HSM/token interaction; supports terminology and integration claims around PKCS#11-backed key storage and cryptographic operations.

sources.title: NIST SP 800-207 Zero Trust Architecture
sources.scope_notes: Authoritative definition of zero trust, assume-breach posture, identity-centric access, and resource-focused protection; useful for architectural claims tying workload identity and segmentation to zero-trust outcomes.

sources.title: Vault Integrated Storage
sources.scope_notes: Primary Vault source for integrated storage (Raft), cluster membership, HA behavior, sealing/unsealing implications, and storage architecture trade-offs on bare metal.

sources.title: Vault Kubernetes Auth Method
sources.scope_notes: Official Vault guidance for Kubernetes auth, TokenReview, service account JWT handling, BoundServiceAccountTokenVolume changes, and role binding patterns.

sources.title: Kubernetes Admission Webhook Good Practices
sources.scope_notes: Authoritative operational guidance for webhook availability, latency, namespace scoping, match conditions, fail-open design, and deadlock-avoidance patterns.

sources.title: Kubernetes Validating Admission Policy
sources.scope_notes: Primary source for native CEL-based validating admission, policy/binding resources, validation actions, failure behavior, and matchConditions semantics.

sources.title: Kubernetes Pod Security Admission
sources.scope_notes: Official source for PSA feature state, namespace labels, and the privileged/baseline/restricted levels that replaced PodSecurityPolicy-era workflows.
